description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a pages job that runs only on the master branch. In the before_script run apt-get update >/dev/null, apt-get install -y locales >/dev/null, echo "en_US UTF-8" > /etc/locale.gen, locale-gen en_US.UTF-8, export LANG=en_US.UTF-8, export LANGUAGE=en_US:en, and export LC_ALL=en_US.UTF-8. In the script install rake version 10.0.2 with gem install rake --version=10.0.2, install jekyll with gem install jekyll, then build the site with jekyll build -d public. Publish the public directory as a pages artifact.
